title: CustomWelcome
description: Configurable welcome and farewell messages to users with motd included.
body:
The simplest plugin to customize join and leave messages on your server.

![Banner1](https://i.imgur.com/h3Vs9rq.png) With **CustomWelcome** you will be able to change the messages that appear in the server chat when a player joins or leaves in the simplest way. You also have a message that will only be sent when a user joins the server for the first time with a counter of players who have been joining during the life of the server. You will also be able to customize a server introduction message called MOTD to your liking. All messages can be enabled/disabled from config file. ![Banner2](https://i.imgur.com/bz4Xr5P.png)
![Banner3](https://i.imgur.com/U3gXK40.png) - /cw version ➣ Check the plugin version. - /cw reload ➣ Reload the plugin config. - /cw ➣ Principal command and shows help. - /cw motd ➣ Previews the active motd in the config. ![Banner4](https://i.imgur.com/gqPqQl4.png) - customwelcome.admin ➣ Allows you to use administrator commands. ![Banner5](https://i.imgur.com/4ZfEr4L.png) Install [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) and see the available placeholders for this plugin [here](https://wiki.placeholderapi.com/users/placeholder-list/). **Placeholder of total player count:** %player_count%

![bStats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/CustomWelcome.svg)

This is my first plugin, if you find any error, bug or improvement proposal you can write it on [Discord](https://discord.gg/ncTMjcNWPx) or [GitHub](https://github.com/Btd20/CustomWelcome/issues). Thanks for download my plugin!
